Video.summary: Kim walks us through how to create hand-shaped apples, easy for kids to follow!
Video.title: The Best Ideas For Kids: Handprint Apple

Image.alt: The Best Ideas For Kids: Handprint Apple
The Best Ideas For Kids: Handprint Apple

Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 11 - Fairy Rings

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are making first day of school memories.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories

Video.summary: Follow along with Cheryl as she teaches how to make a wave and box stitch.
Video.title: Knitting Stitch Along: Wave And Box Stitch

Image.alt: Knitting Stitch Along: Wave And Box Stitch
Knitting Stitch Along: Wave And Box Stitch

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we celebrate Strawberry season with a healthy treat from healthy Chef and Partyologist Nancy Waldeck.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Firecracker.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker

Video.summary: A detailed comparison of the current two-component hardwax oils on the market.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Hardwax Oil Comparison

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Hardwax Oil Comparison
The Wood Whisperer: Hardwax Oil Comparison

Video.summary: Marc teaches how to fix up ugly edges on your projects.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Edge Banding aka On The Edge

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Edge Banding aka On The Edge
The Wood Whisperer: Edge Banding aka On The Edge

Video.summary: It seems that I'm gaining something of a reputation as a "frequent shop-mover." It's probably well-deserved since I've moved my shop four times already. If you're playing along with the Where's The Wood Whisperer home game, here's the score so far.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Out of the Dream Shop

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Out of the Dream Shop
The Wood Whisperer: Moving Out of the Dream Shop

Video.summary: In the Weekend Wall Shelf episode, I showed you how to use a parallel jig to create dados. But the jig was originally created for making coves at the tablesaw. So here's a special jig made specifically for the purpose of creating dados with your router. The best part is, you can get exact-width dados every time!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Exact-Width Dado Jig

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Exact-Width Dado Jig
The Wood Whisperer: Exact-Width Dado Jig

Video.summary: This fun little pull toy is easy to make. The great thing about it is you can get your child involved in the process at whatever level you're comfortable with. Older kids can cut and sand the parts. Younger kids can paint and assemble the grasshoppers.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Grasshopper Pull Toy

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Grasshopper Pull Toy
The Wood Whisperer: Grasshopper Pull Toy

Video.summary: Applying oil finishes sparingly is the key to avoiding problems with curing and other flaws in the surface.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Better Way to Apply Oil Finishes!

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: A Better Way to Apply Oil Finishes!
The Wood Whisperer: A Better Way to Apply Oil Finishes!

Video.summary: If you are one of those folks who wants to begin detaching from the tablesaw, you're going to need to find alternative methods for doing the things that we typically use the tablesaw for, such as cutting tenons. Fortunately, the bandsaw is a very good alternative.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Tenons on the Bandsaw

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Tenons on the Bandsaw
The Wood Whisperer: Tenons on the Bandsaw

Video.summary: Darrell Peart is a furniture-maker, author, and instructor living in the Pacific Northwest. His work is heavily influenced by the work of the Greene brothers and as you can see on his website, Darrell likes to put his own spin on it. This interview took place in March of 2009 at the William Ng School.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Interview with Darrell Peart

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Interview with Darrell Peart
The Wood Whisperer: Interview with Darrell Peart

Video.summary: Tool storage is a challenge for any workshop. My current dilemma is how to store my portable power tools so that they are out of their cases and accessible. There is no one-size-fits-all solution, but I hope sharing my thoughts on this topic will at least get your gears turning so you can tackle the storage challenges in your own shop.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Tool Storage Cabinet

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Tool Storage Cabinet
The Wood Whisperer: Tool Storage Cabinet

Video.summary: Taking old oak cabinets from blah to beautiful with some paint.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Painting Oak Cabinets - Transform Your Kitchen!

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Painting Oak Cabinets - Transform Your Kitchen!
The Wood Whisperer: Painting Oak Cabinets - Transform Your Kitchen!

Video.summary: Mother Nature always wins. So when you make outdoor furniture you have two choices: commit to a regular maintenance schedule or come to terms with the weathered gray look. An easy thing you can do to help the cause is to prevent moisture from entering into the legs. This simple trick requires nothing more than epoxy and masking tape.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet
The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet

Video.summary: The mortise and tenon joint is fundamental to good woodworking. There are lots of variations of the mortise and tenon including what I'm going to show you today: the double mortise and tenon joint. The concept is simple. Instead of having one giant mortise and tenon joint, we split it into two.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Double Mortise and Tenon Joints

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Double Mortise and Tenon Joints
The Wood Whisperer: Double Mortise and Tenon Joints

Video.summary: Festool's new CMS Router Table hits the market in October 2012. Here's a first look at some of the main features and add-ons!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table
The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table

Video.summary: It’s that time of year again: Holiday Project Time! So this year, I decided to make a few little keepsake boxes, thanks to some advice from The Great Woodini. I also took inspiration from a box Nicole keeps on her nightstand and developed a new design that is much more practical for the average woodworker to make.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Keepsake Box

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Keepsake Box
The Wood Whisperer: Keepsake Box

Video.summary: We take a look at urea resin woodworking glues. These glues definitely have their advantages: low water content, gap-filling, long open time, and rigid glue lines just to name a few. But keep in mind the one big disadvantage: safety. These glues are pretty nasty and you might be best served considering other options. But with proper precautions, this glue can be a nice addition to your shop.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Urea Resin Woodworking Glues

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Urea Resin Woodworking Glues
The Wood Whisperer: Urea Resin Woodworking Glues

Video.summary: There's only one thing more important to me than woodworking and that's family. Jersey tomato pie and BBQ are tied for third. So here's a fun little "slice of life" video of my boy enjoying a day of work in the shop.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Mateo "The Apprentice"

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Mateo "The Apprentice"
The Wood Whisperer: Mateo "The Apprentice"

Video.summary: Learn how to make a vintage Chinese flower display.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Vintage China Flower Display

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Vintage China Flower Display
FaveCrafts: Vintage China Flower Display

Video.summary: What's up guys! For today's Frog Food we are making paper dolls from start to finish. From poses to clothing we've got ya covered, so sit back, relax and enjoy!!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls
Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Video.summary: Ready to start making perfect flower stems and friendship bracelets? This How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool guide shows you just how easy using this tool is. Plus, this is a great tool you can use for all different kinds of crafts that require a little extra twist. Whether you are making flowers and need a stem, or you are working with wire on some DIY jewelry projects, this tool can become your go to! This Sizzix tool is worth giving a try if you want to expand your craft tools collection!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool
FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we're dipping into some summer treats.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Dipping into Summer Eats & Crafts

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Dipping into Summer Eats & Crafts
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Dipping into Summer Eats & Crafts

Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 3 - Cluster 6 Alternating

Video.summary: Madonna teaches HT6 Closed Alternating.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 5 - HT6 Closed Alternating

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 5 - HT6 Closed Alternating
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 5 - HT6 Closed Alternating

Video.summary: Many brides-to-be are asking How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs that are unique enough to reflect their style but don't cost an arm and a leg. That's where this DIY wedding video tutorial comes in. Learn how to use embossing and die cutting techniques to make absolutely adorable and spring-themed wedding invitations and programs. Wedding crafts like the ones featured in this DIY craft video help you save money while still adding a personal touch to your big, beautiful day.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs
FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we're celebrating summer fun and Father's Day.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Father's Day

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Father's Day
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Father's Day

Video.summary: Learn how to make a beautiful vintage plate cake stand.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand
FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Video.summary: Time for another frog food today we’re gonna turn my Dog Bowie into an anime character with a pop punk style. From inspo to highlights we got it covered. So sit back, relax, and enjoy!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character
Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character
